requirement_topic.en: UAE scope and conformity route — MoIAT-led ECAS and EQM
requirement_topic.zh: 阿联酋适用范围与合规路径——MoIAT主导的ECAS与EQM
requirement_topic.zht: 阿聯酋適用範圍與合規路徑——MoIAT主導的ECAS與EQM

summary.en: The Ministry of Industry and Advanced Technology (MoIAT), which absorbed ESMA technical-conformity functions, uses ECAS product-status pathways and related services for regulated products. For many electronics imports, the UAE-side gate includes confirming whether the battery model is mandatory, optional, or outside ECAS scope, then selecting ECAS, EQM, or product-status documentation.
summary.zh: 工业和高级技术部（MoIAT）接续ESMA技术评定职能，对受监管产品提供ECAS合格评定与产品状态服务。对多数电子类进口而言，阿联酋侧需先确认该锂电池型号是否属强制、可选或不在ECAS目录范围内，再决定走ECAS、EQM或产品状态文件路径。
summary.zht: 工業和先進科技部（MoIAT）承接ESMA之技術評估職能，對受監管產品提供ECAS合格評定及產品狀態服務。對大多數電子類進口而言，阿聯酋側需先確認該鋰電池型號是否為強制、可選或不在ECAS目錄範圍內，再決定走ECAS、EQM或產品狀態文件路徑。

standards_or_laws: UAE.S National Standards framework and MoIAT product conformity service model
GSO-regional standard references adopted into UAE market documents
UAE.S / ESMA transition documentation for technical conformity scope

summary.en: China generally relies on GB/T battery standards, CCC scope controls, and export customs documentation, but domestic conformity is not UAE destination approval. The Chinese baseline can support technical readiness; it does not replace UAE route confirmation or in-country importer/registrant responsibilities.
summary.zh: 中国通常以GB/T电池标准、CCC管理范围和出口报关文件为依据，但国内符合性不等于阿联酋目的地批准。中国基线可支撑技术准备，但不能替代阿联酋路径确认或境内进口商/注册人责任结构。
summary.zht: 中國通常以GB/T電池標準、CCC管理範圍和出口報關文件為基礎，但國內合規並非阿聯酋目的地批准。中國基線可支援技術準備，但不能取代阿聯酋路徑確認或境內進口商/登記人責任結構。

standards_or_laws: CNCA / CCC requirements for listed electrical products
China export declaration rules for batteries and dangerous goods

gap.en: The main exporter-facing gap is assuming Chinese domestic compliance automatically satisfies UAE filing and party model. In practice, model-level scope confirmation and local importer/registrant ownership must be clarified before Jebel Ali or Khalifa arrival.
gap.zh: 出口商常见差距在于误认为中国国内合规自动满足阿联酋申报和主体模型要求。实务上应在到达杰贝阿里或哈利法前确认型号级范围以及本地进口商/注册人主体归属。
gap.zht: 出口商常見差距在於誤以為中國國內合規自動滿足阿聯酋申報與主體模型要求。實務上應於到達傑貝阿里或哈利法前確認型號級範圍及本地進口商／登記人主體歸屬。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory only when the model is confirmed in scope by UAE technical route rules and where importer-facing filing or declaration services are required.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory only for Chinese categories that are CCC- or China-regulatory mandatory in the domestic export process; this does not become automatic UAE route entitlement.

source.publisher: United Arab Emirates Ministry of Industry and Advanced Technology (MoIAT)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A valid market-entry packet should first confirm UAE route scope and local-party obligations, then attach conformity evidence. Chinese evidence is useful context, not a legal substitute.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 合规资料包应先确认阿联酋通行路径与本地方义务，再配套提交合格依据。中国资料属于技术支撑，不是法定义替代。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 合規資料包應先確認阿聯酋通行路徑與本地方義務，再配套提交合格依據。中國資料僅為技術支撐，不是法律上可直接替代。
